overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Far Cry 5) showing exploration of a rural Montana lakeside area. The player walks along a rocky shore past a wooden shed and docked seaplane, discovering a dead body on the dock before walking to the end to look at lily pads in the shallow water.

calm lake water with green algae near the shore
dense evergreen trees lining the far shore and hills
weathered wooden pier extending into the lake

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny rocky lakeshore with pine forests in the background. The camera moves forward along the gravel shore toward a wooden dock, with a red and white seaplane visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a rustic wooden shed with smoke rising from a grill beside it. Trash is scattered on the dirt ground, and a life preserver post stands near the dock as the seaplane becomes more prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shed with smoking grill and dock with dead body

agents.ego_description: moving around the shed and discovering a dead body on the dock

dead body lying face down in a pool of blood on the dock

entered.detail: checkerboard sign reading Spread Eagle Bar mounted on a wooden pole
dark red blood pooled and smeared on the wooden dock planks

segments.scene_description: Moving around the smoking shed, the camera turns to reveal a gruesome scene on the dock—a dead body lying in a pool of blood. The Spread Eagle Bar sign is visible on the right as the seaplane comes into view on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock over lily pad covered water

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock past the dead body toward the end

notable_agents.action: dead body with blood stains lying on the dock planks

segments.scene_description: Stepping onto the wooden dock, the camera moves past the bloody crime scene toward the end of the pier. Fishing gear, traffic cones, and a tackle box are scattered along the dock planks as the water with lily pads becomes visible on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lake water with lily pads at dock edge

events.description: camera tilts down to look at the water and lily pads below the dock

agents.ego_description: looking down at the lily pads and shallow water from the end of the dock

entered.detail: green lily pads floating on the water surface
clear shallow water revealing rocks and lily pads beneath the surface

segments.scene_description: At the end of the dock, the camera looks down into the shallow lake water filled with lily pads. The fishing gear and blood stains are now behind as the view focuses on the aquatic vegetation and clear water below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a sunny lakeshore that transitions from a peaceful natural setting into a grim crime scene. It begins by moving across a gravel shore with pine forests in the background, heading toward a wooden dock where a red and white seaplane is moored. As the camera approaches a rustic wooden shed with a smoking grill and scattered trash, the view shifts to reveal a dead body lying in a pool of blood on the dock beside a Spread Eagle Bar sign. The camera then steps onto the wooden planks, passing by fishing gear and traffic cones before moving further away from the bloodstains toward the edge of the pier. Finally, the perspective tilts downward at the end of the dock to focus on the clear, shallow lake water filled with floating lily pads.
